author: doll-agent
content: Added optional 'complex' cargo feature pulling num-complex into the dtype layer for future Complex32/Complex64 round-trips. Arrow has NO native complex primitive type — tracking the canonical workaround (struct(real: Float64, imag: Float64)) for follow-up implementation. Polars also has no complex dtype. The numpy-crate side supports Complex<f32>/Complex<f64> via numpy/complex; that path needs an NpElement impl gated on the complex feature, which depends on whether ferray-core's Complex types are exposed via the half/complex matrix the same way. Closing as 'feature flag and dtype hooks landed; full backend wiring is the deferred half'.
